raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need a bash command to list all variables names containing "H". Variables in shell environment? Use env or set? Probably list all environment variables and shell variables. Use compgen -v to list shell variables. Then grep for H. So: compgen -v | grep H. That lists names containing H. If case-sensitive? "H". So final.
